sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Xometry (NASDAQ:XMTR) Is Carrying A Fair Bit Of Debt
feed.summary: Xometry (NASDAQ:XMTR) holds about US$284.1m in debt as of March 2025, but with US$231.4m in cash, its net debt is US$52.7m. Despite growing revenue by 19% to US$574m, the company incurred an EBIT loss of US$52m and burned through US$27m in cash. This financial situation, along with liabilities outweighing cash and near-term receivables by US$62.2m, suggests a degree of risk for the stock.

feed.title: Chinese NMPA Accepts New Drug Application for Illuccix for Prostate Cancer Imaging
feed.summary: Telix Pharmaceuticals Limited, in partnership with Grand Pharmaceutical Group Limited, announced the Chinese National Medical Products Administration (NMPA) has accepted a New Drug Application (NDA) for Illuccix (TLX591-Px), a prostate cancer imaging agent. The submission seeks a broad label and includes positive data from the Illuccix China Pivotal Phase 3 Registration study, which demonstrated a high positive predictive value and significant impact on treatment plans for Chinese patients. This marks a major milestone for Telix's global expansion into the strategically important Chinese market.

feed.title: Vaughan David Investments LLC IL Has $40.90 Million Stake in Waste Management, Inc. $WM
feed.summary: Vaughan David Investments LLC IL significantly increased its stake in Waste Management, Inc. (NYSE:WM) by 12,248% in Q3, now holding 185,220 shares valued at approximately $40.90 million. Waste Management's Q3 earnings reported an EPS of $1.98 and revenue of $6.44 billion, showing a 14.9% year-over-year increase in revenue despite missing consensus estimates. The company pays a quarterly dividend of $0.825, and analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with an average target price near $250.45.

feed.title: Microsoft (MSFT) Traded Lower as Its Reported Azure Cloud Growth and Forward Guidance Fell Short of Expectations
feed.summary: Microsoft's stock (MSFT) recently traded lower after its Azure cloud growth and forward guidance, while still strong at 39% YoY and 37% projected, fell short of high investor expectations. This was attributed partly to revenue recognition lagging strong demand and capacity constraints, leading the company to signal increased CapEx. Despite this, demand signals are improving, with commercial bookings surging, and the company remains a significant holding for Alger Spectra Fund due to its role in corporate digitization.

feed.title: Lennox L40 Smart Thermostat Named "Smart Thermostat of the Year" in the IoT Breakthrough Awards
feed.summary: The Lennox L40 Smart Thermostat was named "Smart Thermostat of the Year" in the IoT Breakthrough Awards for its advanced connected features, including geo-fencing, customizable schedules, and system insight tools. These features enable energy-efficient operation and seamless integration with leading smart home platforms like Samsung SmartThings and Apple HomeKit. The thermostat and its accompanying Lennox Home app emphasize a balance between technical complexity and user-friendly operation, as highlighted by Lennox CTO Prakash Bedapudi.

feed.title: Platform Technology Partners Purchases 16,647 Shares of Prologis, Inc. $PLD
feed.summary: Platform Technology Partners significantly increased its stake in Prologis, Inc. (NYSE:PLD) by 782.7% in Q3, acquiring 16,647 additional shares and bringing its total holdings to 18,774 shares valued at $2.15 million. While Prologis offers a 3.0% dividend yield, its high payout ratio of 117.78% raises concerns about sustainability. The company, a real estate investment trust specializing in logistics facilities, currently holds a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating from analysts with an average target price of $133.00, despite recent insider share sales.

feed.title: Why 'Cheap' Software Stocks Could Be The Next Big AI Value Trap
feed.summary: Analyst Jordi Visser from 22V Research warns that recent deep drawdowns in enterprise software stocks like Adobe, Salesforce, and ServiceNow are not cyclical selloffs but rather structural changes due to AI-driven demand suppression. He argues that AI is fundamentally changing how software is built and used, making traditional software models and their associated multiples misleading. Visser suggests that investors should not view these falling prices as value opportunities but as a reflection of a contracting market where AI is eroding the need for administrative friction and seat-based pricing.

feed.title: US patent office upholds First Solar's patents against third-party challenges
feed.summary: The United States Patent and Trademark Office upheld First Solar's solar cell technology patents, denying challenges from JinkoSolar, Mundra Solar, and Canadian Solar. These companies had sought to invalidate First Solar's TOPCon technology patents, against which First Solar has also filed patent infringement lawsuits. First Solar acquired these U.S. TOPCon patents through its 2013 acquisition of TetraSun.

feed.title: Professional Advisory Services Inc. Sells 4,509 Shares of General Dynamics Corporation $GD
feed.summary: Professional Advisory Services Inc. decreased its stake in General Dynamics by 6.1% in the third quarter, selling 4,509 shares to hold a total of 69,264 shares valued at $23.62 million. Despite this sale, General Dynamics remains the fund's 11th largest position. The aerospace company recently reported strong earnings, beating analyst estimates with a 10.6% revenue increase and declaring a $1.50 quarterly dividend, while institutional ownership is high and analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating.

feed.title: FDA asks for full HOPE-3 data on DMD cell therapy, no new trials
feed.summary: Capricor Therapeutics announced that the FDA has requested the full HOPE-3 clinical study report (CSR) for its Deramiocel Biologics License Application (BLA) for Duchenne muscular dystrophy (DMD). The FDA did not ask for additional clinical studies or new patient data. Capricor plans to submit the CSR in February 2026 to address a July 2025 Complete Response Letter and expects a new PDUFA target action date to be assigned.

feed.title: ConocoPhillips (NYSE:COP) Given Neutral Rating at JPMorgan Chase & Co.
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. has reiterated a "Neutral" rating for ConocoPhillips (NYSE:COP), setting a price target of $98.00, suggesting a slight downside. The consensus among analysts is a "Moderate Buy" with an average target of $110.83. The article also highlights recent insider activity, including CEO Ryan Lance selling a significant portion of his shares and Director William H. McRaven purchasing shares.

feed.title: BWMX: Analyst Raises Price Target to $30, Maintains Buy Rating
feed.summary: An analyst from Small Cap Consumer Research has raised Betterware de Mexico SAPI's (BWMX) price target to $30, a 33.33% increase from its previous target of $22.50, while maintaining a "Buy" rating. This positive outlook contrasts with the average analyst target of $19.35 and GuruFocus' estimated fair value of $15.47, which suggests a potential downside. Betterware de Mexico operates in direct-to-consumer sales for home organization and beauty products, with most revenue from its B&PC segment in Mexico.

feed.title: Professional Advisory Services Inc. Has $21.65 Million Position in Arthur J. Gallagher & Co. $AJG
feed.summary: Professional Advisory Services Inc. increased its stake in Arthur J. Gallagher & Co. (NYSE:AJG) by 8.2% in the third quarter, now holding 69,909 shares valued at $21.65 million, making it their 14th largest holding. Despite missing recent quarterly earnings estimates, Arthur J. Gallagher & Co. saw revenue rise 20.2% year-over-year, and generated a quarterly dividend of $0.65 per share. Wall Street analysts currently rate AJG as a "Hold" with an average target price of $290.50, though some have recently lowered their targets.

feed.title: Pacific Heights Asset Management LLC Buys 150,000 Shares of Weyerhaeuser Company $WY
feed.summary: Pacific Heights Asset Management LLC significantly increased its stake in Weyerhaeuser Company (NYSE:WY) by 75%, purchasing an additional 150,000 shares, bringing its total to 350,000 shares valued at approximately $8.676 million. Other institutional investors also adjusted their positions in Weyerhaeuser, while insider transactions included a director buying shares and the CEO selling a portion of his holdings. The article also provides details on Weyerhaeuser's stock performance, recent earnings, dividend announcement, and analyst ratings, noting a consensus "Hold" rating with an average target price of $28.50.

feed.title: Root Financial Partners LLC Increases Stock Holdings in Oracle Corporation $ORCL
feed.summary: Root Financial Partners LLC significantly increased its stake in Oracle Corporation during Q3, now holding 13,195 shares. While Oracle demonstrated strong Q3 earnings and declared a dividend, its outlook is complicated by insider selling, debt concerns related to AI investments, and a bondholder lawsuit. Despite these risks, analyst sentiment remains largely positive, with a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating.

feed.title: lululemon athletica inc. $LULU Shares Purchased by Pacific Heights Asset Management LLC
feed.summary: Pacific Heights Asset Management LLC significantly increased its stake in lululemon athletica (NASDAQ:LULU) by 44.4%, acquiring an additional 20,000 shares to hold a total of 65,000 shares valued at approximately $11.57 million. This move comes as lululemon beat its Q3 earnings expectations with $2.59 EPS and $2.57 billion in revenue, leading to several analysts raising their price targets, although the consensus remains a "Hold" with a target of $228.19. Despite an insider selling 13,511 shares, institutional investors now own 85.20% of the stock.

feed.title: Professional Advisory Services Inc. Makes New Investment in Jacobs Solutions Inc. $J
feed.summary: Professional Advisory Services Inc. has made a new investment in Jacobs Solutions Inc. (NYSE:J), acquiring 171,311 shares valued at approximately $25.67 million, making it their 7th largest holding. Insiders have also recently bought shares, indicating confidence in the company. Despite beating EPS estimates, Jacobs Solutions missed revenue expectations, and analysts currently rate the stock as a "Moderate Buy" with an average price target of $155.90.

feed.title: Digital Realty set to enter Malaysia, will acquire 1.5MW data center outside Kuala Lumpur
feed.summary: Digital Realty is set to enter the Malaysian market by acquiring TelcoHub 1, a 1.5MW data center in Cyberjaya, from CSF Advisers. The acquisition includes a land parcel for future expansion up to 14MW and is expected to close in the first half of this year, with CSF's CEO and leadership team joining Digital Realty. This move expands Digital Realty's presence in APAC, adding to its existing facilities in neighboring Singapore and Indonesia, as well as other countries in the region.

feed.title: IBM To Rally Around 8%? Here Are 10 Top Analyst Forecasts For Tuesday
feed.summary: This article compiles recent analyst ratings and price target adjustments for ten major companies, including IBM, Uber Technologies, and Applied Materials. While some analysts downgraded stocks or cut price targets, others, like Evercore ISI Group for IBM and Needham for Applied Materials, raised targets, indicating potential rallies for certain stocks. The article provides a quick overview of Wall Street's changing outlooks on several prominent corporations.

feed.title: Fastenal (NASDAQ:FAST) Posts Earnings Results, Meets Expectations
feed.summary: Fastenal (NASDAQ:FAST) reported Q4 EPS of $0.26, matching analyst expectations, with revenue of $2.03 billion, slightly below estimates but up 11.1% year-over-year. The company increased its quarterly dividend to $0.24. Analysts largely hold a "Hold" rating with a consensus price target of $48.73.

feed.title: 85% of Sundance Filmmakers Choose Adobe as Company Releases New AI Video Innovations and $10M in Creator Grants
feed.summary: Adobe announced new AI innovations for video editing and motion design, including enhanced masking features in Premiere and significant upgrades in After Effects, coinciding with 85% of Sundance filmmakers using Adobe products. The company is also investing an additional $10 million in its Film & TV Fund to support aspiring filmmakers from underserved communities, bringing the total commitment to $20 million over three years. These initiatives aim to empower creators with advanced tools and career development opportunities, particularly those integrating AI into their workflows.

feed.title: Prologis (PLD): Truist Securities Maintains 'Buy' Rating and Raises Price Target
feed.summary: Truist Securities has reiterated its 'Buy' rating for Prologis (PLD) and increased its price target from $131.00 to $142.00, signaling confidence in the company's future growth. This move follows several other analysts who have also adjusted their ratings and price targets for Prologis positively in recent weeks. The average target price from 20 analysts is $137.05, suggesting a modest upside from the current price, with a consensus "Outperform" status from 25 brokerage firms.

feed.title: Extra Space Storage's Quarterly Earnings Preview: What You Need to Know
feed.summary: Extra Space Storage Inc. (EXR), the largest self-storage operator in the U.S. and an S&P 500 member, is set to release its fiscal Q4 2025 earnings. Analysts expect a slight increase in core FFO to $2.04 per share, though the company's shares have underperformed the broader market and real estate sector over the past year. Despite beating Q3 2025 core FFO estimates, its stock fell due to missed revenue and a decline in net income.

feed.title: Meyer Turku cuts steel for Royal Caribbean's Icon 5
feed.summary: Meyer Turku has begun production on Royal Caribbean International's fifth Icon-class ship, scheduled for delivery in summer 2028. This marks progress in their long-term cooperation agreement, with each Icon vessel valued at €2 billion, significantly benefiting the Finnish economy through local suppliers and employment. The shipyard aims for increased efficiency and quality with each ship in the series.

feed.title: OpenAI becomes ServiceNow’s preferred AI partner
feed.summary: OpenAI has become ServiceNow's "preferred intelligence" provider through a new multi-year agreement. This partnership will integrate OpenAI's latest models, including GPT-5.2 and multimodal AI, directly into the ServiceNow AI Platform to enhance enterprise workflows across various business functions. While OpenAI is now preferred, ServiceNow emphasizes that customers retain the flexibility to choose from multiple AI providers integrated into their platform.

feed.title: Abbott picks up CE mark for TactiFlex dual-energy ablation catheter
feed.summary: Abbott has received CE mark for its TactiFlex Duo Ablation Catheter, Sensor-Enabled, for treating AFib, and has already seen its first commercial cases in Europe. The system offers a dual-energy approach, combining radiofrequency and pulsed field energy capabilities, to tailor therapy and reduce the risk of damaging adjacent tissue. TactiFlex Duo has also been granted FDA breakthrough device designation for ventricular tachycardia and is currently under evaluation in the U.S.

feed.title: Home Depot & Lowe's shoppers check your receipts to secure $1.5k settlement cash
feed.summary: A new class-action settlement involving Rheem Manufacturing Co. and Melet Plastics Inc. offers up to $1,500 to consumers who purchased specific Rheem water heaters with defective poly drain valves from retailers like Lowe's and Home Depot between 2019 and 2023. Claimants must provide documentation of losses and can also receive warranty extensions or a new brass drain valve. The deadline to claim is March 20, 2026.

feed.title: Deckers Brands lines up Jan. 29 Q3 call, replay online 30 days
feed.summary: Deckers Brands (NYSE: DECK) announced it will host a conference call on Thursday, January 29, 2026, at approximately 4:30 pm Eastern Time, to discuss its third-quarter fiscal 2026 results. The broadcast will be available on ir.deckers.com and will remain accessible for at least 30 days afterward. The company is a global leader in designing, marketing, and distributing footwear, apparel, and accessories, with brands like UGG®, HOKA®, and Teva®.

feed.title: AIG and CVC Announce Strategic Partnership
feed.summary: American International Group, Inc. (AIG) and CVC have formed a strategic partnership to support AIG’s long-term investment goals and leverage CVC’s expertise in insurance solutions and private markets. The collaboration involves establishing large-scale separately managed accounts across CVC’s credit strategies and launching a private equity secondaries evergreen platform with AIG as a cornerstone investor. AIG plans to contribute up to $1.5 billion from its existing private equity portfolio to the secondaries platform and allocate up to $2 billion to CVC-managed accounts and funds, with an initial $1 billion deployed by 2026.

feed.title: Paychex authorizes $1B share repurchase
feed.summary: Paychex Inc. announced a significant expansion of its capital return program by authorizing the repurchase of up to $1 billion of its common stock, replacing a prior $400 million approval. The company also declared a quarterly cash dividend of $1.08 per share and expanded its Board of Directors to 11 members, appointing J. Michael Hansen as an independent director. This move underscores Paychex's confidence in its financial strength and commitment to delivering shareholder value.

feed.title: American Eagle signs Lamine Yamal as global brand ambassador
feed.summary: American Eagle Outfitters (NYSE: AEO) has announced a five-year partnership with footballer Lamine Yamal, making him the brand's global ambassador starting in summer 2026. This collaboration marks American Eagle's first multi-year deal with an international sports figure and will feature talent-led campaigns and limited-edition product lines. The partnership aims to position American Eagle at the intersection of culture and sports.

feed.title: American Eagle Announces Lamine Yamal as Global Brand Ambassador
feed.summary: American Eagle (NYSE: AEO) has signed international football star Lamine Yamal as its new Global Brand Ambassador for a historic five-year deal. This partnership will feature talent-led campaigns and limited-edition product collaborations, starting in summer 2026. The collaboration highlights American Eagle's focus on global talent and investment in sports culture, leveraging Yamal's worldwide appeal and confident style.

feed.title: MGM Resorts Powers Up to 100% of Daytime Las Vegas Strip Electricity with Solar
feed.summary: MGM Resorts International has achieved a significant milestone by powering up to 100% of its daytime electricity needs on the Las Vegas Strip with solar energy, thanks to the new Escape Solar and Storage Project. This project, combined with their Mega Solar Array, more than doubles the company's access to renewable energy and includes battery storage for continuous power. This advancement accelerates MGM Resorts' goal to use 100% renewable electricity domestically by 2030, demonstrating a commitment to sustainable operations and long-term cost stability.

feed.title: Georgetown University Selects Cisco to Transform Campus Connectivity
feed.summary: Cisco has announced a multi-year partnership with Georgetown University to modernize its campus network with advanced connectivity and digital experiences, featuring one of the largest Wi-Fi 7 rollouts in higher education. This collaboration aims to provide seamless, secure connectivity for students, faculty, and staff, supporting academic missions and research with high-speed, low-latency access. The initiative also includes enhanced security measures and Cisco's involvement in the "Hoya Forward" platform to promote innovation through technology.

feed.title: SUBARU RECOGNIZED BY S&P GLOBAL MOBILITY FOR HIGHEST OVERALL LOYALTY TO DEALER
feed.summary: Subaru of America (SOA) has been recognized by S&P Global Mobility for achieving the Highest Overall Loyalty to Dealer for the second consecutive year. This award highlights Subaru's success in building strong relationships between its customers and its nationwide retailer network. President and COO Jeff Walters attributed this achievement to the dedication of Subaru's retailers in fostering customer confidence and ensuring exceptional experiences throughout the car-buying journey.

feed.title: Jim Cramer Says Sell Super Micro — Calls A European Chipmaker 'Cheap And Good'
feed.summary: Jim Cramer recommended selling Super Micro Computer due to a Goldman Sachs Sell rating, while endorsing European chipmaker STMicroelectronics as "cheap and good." He also advised selling Smith & Nephew, buying Medline, and expressed positive views on UiPath and Huntington Bancshares, but not Alkermes. These recommendations are based on recent analyst ratings, company news, and his "Mad Money Lightning Round" opinions.

feed.title: The Kraft Heinz Company to Report Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Results on Feb. 11, 2026
feed.summary: The Kraft Heinz Company announced it will release its fourth quarter and full-year 2025 financial results on Wednesday, February 11, 2026. The company will issue a press release and supplemental materials before market open, followed by a live question-and-answer session with analysts at 9:00 a.m. EST. All materials and an audio replay will be accessible via their investor relations website.

feed.title: Insights into Travelers Companies's Upcoming Earnings
feed.summary: Travelers Companies (NYSE: TRV) is set to release its quarterly earnings report on Wednesday, January 21, 2026. Analysts project an EPS of $8.60 for the quarter. The article provides an overview of the company's past earnings performance and its stock market performance, noting that shares are up 9.2% over the last 52 weeks.

feed.title: Uncovering Potential: Prologis's Earnings Preview
feed.summary: Prologis (NYSE: PLD) is set to announce its quarterly earnings on January 21, 2026, with analysts estimating an EPS of $0.99. The company has a history of beating EPS estimates and long-term shareholders are bullish given the 15.7% share price increase over the last 52 weeks. Analyst consensus for Prologis is a "Buy" with an average one-year price target of $140.88, indicating a potential 6.12% upside.

feed.title: Georgetown to deploy one of higher ed's largest Wi‑Fi 7 networks
feed.summary: Cisco and Georgetown University have announced a multi-year partnership to modernize the university's campus network, including one of the largest Wi-Fi 7 deployments in higher education. This initiative will cover classrooms, dorms, and stadiums across both Hilltop and Capitol campuses, leveraging Cisco's Wi-Fi 7 technology across all wireless spectrums, including the 6 GHz band, to provide faster speeds and lower latency. The collaboration aims to support advanced digital learning, research, and campus life, enabling an AI-ready environment with enhanced security and automation.

feed.title: Lee Danner & Bass Inc. Has $17.22 Million Stock Holdings in Caterpillar Inc. $CAT
feed.summary: Lee Danner & Bass Inc. reduced its stake in Caterpillar Inc. by 5.7% in the third quarter, now holding 36,091 shares valued at $17.22 million. Despite this reduction, Caterpillar remains a significant holding for the firm, accounting for 1.3% of its portfolio. Analyst sentiment for CAT is largely positive, with a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating and an average price target of $623.10, following strong Q3 earnings that beat estimates.

feed.title: Pacific Heights Asset Management LLC Increases Holdings in AvalonBay Communities, Inc. $AVB
feed.summary: Pacific Heights Asset Management LLC has increased its stake in AvalonBay Communities, Inc. (AVB) by 41.7%, reaching 85,000 shares valued at approximately $16.42 million. Institutional investors now own about 92.61% of AVB. Despite this increase, analyst sentiment is mixed with an average "Hold" rating and a price target of $205.75, with some recent downward revisions by brokers.

feed.title: Pacific Heights Asset Management LLC Has $23.99 Million Holdings in Amgen Inc. $AMGN
feed.summary: Pacific Heights Asset Management LLC increased its stake in Amgen Inc. by 28.8% in Q3, now holding 85,000 shares valued at $23.99 million. This makes Amgen its 23rd-largest position. Amgen itself reported strong Q3 earnings, beating analyst expectations, and raised its quarterly dividend while maintaining a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts with a $339.45 price target.

feed.title: Prince Harry, Meghan exec-produce 'Cookie Queens' in 42West's Sundance slate
feed.summary: Dolphin's subsidiary 42West is bringing nine film and television projects to the 2026 Sundance Film Festival, spanning six programming areas. These projects are actively seeking distribution, with highlights including "COOKIE QUEENS," executively produced by Prince Harry and Meghan. The announcement follows Dolphin's recent strategic initiatives and improved Q3 2025 financial performance.

feed.title: Pacific Heights Asset Management LLC Buys 70,000 Shares of Albemarle Corporation $ALB
feed.summary: Pacific Heights Asset Management LLC has increased its stake in Albemarle Corporation (NYSE:ALB) by 53.8%, purchasing an additional 70,000 shares to bring its total holdings to 200,000 shares valued at approximately $16.22 million. This move comes as analysts have raised price targets for Albemarle, leading to an average "Moderate Buy" rating and a target price of $141.21. The specialty chemicals company recently exceeded Q3 earnings estimates and announced a quarterly dividend of $0.405.

feed.title: Lee Danner & Bass Inc. Purchases 4,092 Shares of Adobe Inc. $ADBE
feed.summary: Lee Danner & Bass Inc. significantly increased its stake in Adobe Inc. (NASDAQ:ADBE) during the third quarter, purchasing an additional 4,092 shares to bring its total holdings to 5,900 shares, valued at approximately $2.081 million. Despite mixed analyst ratings, with an average "Hold" and a price target of $402.85, Adobe recently surpassed quarterly earnings and revenue estimates. Institutional investors collectively own about 81.8% of the company's stock.

feed.title: New heart catheter lets EU doctors switch energy types mid-AFib procedure
feed.summary: Abbott has received CE Mark approval for its TactiFlex Duo Ablation Catheter, Sensor Enabled, allowing for its commercial use in the European Union to treat atrial fibrillation (AFib). This device offers dual-energy therapy, combining radiofrequency and pulsed field ablation, and has already seen its first commercial uses in the EU. The approval is based on strong clinical safety and effectiveness data from the FOCALFLEX CE Mark study and integrates with Abbott's existing EnSite X mapping system.

feed.title: Pacific Heights Asset Management LLC Buys 18,000 Shares of Agilent Technologies, Inc. $A
feed.summary: Pacific Heights Asset Management LLC has increased its stake in Agilent Technologies (NYSE:A) by 17.6%, acquiring an additional 18,000 shares to bring its total holdings to 120,000 shares, valued at approximately $15.40 million. This comes amidst notable insider selling from company executives, while Wall Street analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus with an average price target of $164.50, following Agilent's slight beat on Q3 estimates and setting positive FY2026 EPS guidance.

feed.title: Pacific Heights Asset Management LLC Has $26.18 Million Stock Holdings in ARM Holdings PLC Sponsored ADR $ARM
feed.summary: Pacific Heights Asset Management LLC increased its stake in ARM Holdings PLC Sponsored ADR (NASDAQ:ARM) by 32.1% in the third quarter, bringing its total holdings to 185,000 shares valued at approximately $26.18 million. This makes ARM the firm's 16th largest position, accounting for 1.2% of its holdings. ARM recently exceeded earnings expectations with $0.39 EPS against an anticipated $0.33, and analysts maintain a generally positive outlook with a consensus target price of $175.05.

feed.title: Wynn Resorts, Limited $WYNN Shares Bought by Pacific Heights Asset Management LLC
feed.summary: Pacific Heights Asset Management LLC increased its stake in Wynn Resorts (NASDAQ:WYNN) by 30.4% in the third quarter, purchasing an additional 35,000 shares to hold a total of 150,000 shares valued at approximately $19.24 million. Despite missing EPS estimates, Wynn Resorts reported strong revenue growth and declared a quarterly dividend. Analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with an average target price of $140.15 for the stock.
